sensitivity: 0.370 (95% CI 0.349-0.391) in full intended use population; 0.441 (95% CI 0.386-0.487) in subset with results
specificity: 0.951 (95% CI 0.936-0.963) in full intended use population; 0.943 (95% CI 0.922-0.961) in subset with results
auc: 0.837 (95% CI 0.821-0.852) in subset of population that produced a result
intended_use: OsteoSight™ is a software application intended for use opportunistically with standard anteroposterior (AP) radiographs of the hip or pelvis performed in patients aged 50 years and older. OsteoSight™
intended_use_full: OsteoSight™ is a software application intended for use opportunistically with standard anteroposterior (AP) radiographs of the hip or pelvis performed in patients aged 50 years and older. OsteoSight™ provides a notification in the form of a report to aid radiologists and/or physician interpreters in identifying patients with possible low bone mineral density (BMD) at the femoral neck to prompt a clinical assessment of bone health.
target_condition: Low bone mineral density (BMD) at the femoral neck
ground_truth: Dual-Energy X-ray Absorptiometry (DXA) with T-score < -1.0 SD at femoral neck acquired within 12 months of X-ray
other_metrics: Performance metrics stratified by sex, age group, BMI, race, geographic region, X-ray hardware manufacturer, and X-ray settings (pixel spacing, voltage, exposure) are reported in Tables 5 and 6
